title: Tone training UI + status gating (already trained)

task.description: Build /train UI that loads tone status and gates one-time training. Show URL crawl form + link to paste fallback when untrained; show completed state and disable inputs when trained.
acceptance_criteria: GET tone status shows trained/untrained state correctly for logged-in user.
If trained, /train shows “Training already completed” and training controls are hidden/disabled.
If untrained, /train shows URL Input + Train Button and a visible CTA to paste samples route.
Empty URL shows required-field validation and does not call the training API.
After successful training, UI updates to “Training complete” and enables a CTA Button to /generate.

definition_of_done: Status route protected by session and returns only current user info
ui_requirements: Use Card sections: Status + URL form. Buttons: default (Train), secondary (Paste samples), ghost (Retry). Loading skeleton while fetching status. Error banner with retry; Completed state shows Badge + CTA to Generate.
